title: M6-9 retire fail-open dual-write bridges and authority flag registrations
scope: Empty cohort fail-closed; authority env/profile registrations retired; compatibility mirrors, payload writers, worktree/merge/Oracle implementers, objection BLOCK, rich projections, and UI fallback retained.

verification.command: PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/pytest -q tests/test_mission_dual_write.py tests/test_m6_checkpoint_bridges_flags.py tests/test_run_profile.py tests/test_dual_write_observability.py tests/test_mission_read_model.py tests/test_mission_read_model_api.py tests/test_mission_read_model_wave_b.py tests/test_m6_checkpoint_duplicate_patches.py
ruff check <changed Python files> && git diff --check

fail_closed_probe.command: PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python <empty allowlist + stale authority env probe>

manual_qa.command: env -u AGENT_LAB_MISSION_DUAL_WRITE -u AGENT_LAB_MISSION_DUAL_WRITE_SESSIONS -u AGENT_LAB_MISSION_PLAN_WRITE_AUTHORITY -u AGENT_LAB_MISSION_INBOX_WRITE_AUTHORITY -u AGENT_LAB_MISSION_EXECUTION_WRITE_AUTHORITY PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python <read/answer/execute driver>
manual_qa.cleanup: TemporaryDirectory fixture removed; no long-running process started. Existing PID 19951 on :8765 was not touched. Temporary restore worktree removed.

rollback.command: git worktree add --detach /tmp/agent-lab-m6-9-restore m6-9-restore-20260714; env DUAL_WRITE=1 with sessions unset; mirror_plan_approval; git worktree remove --force /tmp/agent-lab-m6-9-restore
rollback.result: PASS; restore tag legacy behavior returned mirrored=true, state=READY_TO_EXECUTE, and wrote mission-events.jsonl; worktree removed.
